name: Mission Control Dashboard v3.0
description: Complete Mission Control with Tasks Board, Content Pipeline, Calendar, Memory, Team, and Office views
author: James
components: Tasks Board - Track tasks with status, owner, priority
Content Pipeline - Idea → Script → Thumbnail → Filming → Done
Calendar - Scheduled tasks and recurring events
Team - Agents as employees with roles and managers
Office - Visual workspace with agent status
Memory - Searchable memory with global search
